Package main.java.br.usp.icmc.scc0204.javacafe.model

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    CafeSystemContract
    Main contract for the Java Café Point of Sale System.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CafeSystem
    Core business logic implementation for Java Café POS System.
    Order
    Represents a customer order in the Java Café POS system.
    Payment
    Represents a payment transaction for an order.
    Product
    Represents a product in the Java Café inventory system.
    Report
    Report containing sales analytics for a specific period.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    PaymentMethod
    Available payment methods for order checkout.
